Applying to 10010100
Input
I 0 = 1
I 1 = 0
I 2 = 0
I 3 = 1
I 4 = 0
I 5 = 1
I 6 = 0
I 7 = 0
Output
0 I 5 = 1
1 I 6 = 0
2 I 7 = 0
3 C 3n = NOT(1) = 0
4 C 4n = NOT(1) = 0
5 C 5n = NOT(1) = 0

\boxed{10000010}
